messages.subject: [R-jobs] [JOB] Associate Professor in Statistics
messages.body_plain:
The Centre of Excellence in Economics and Data Science ( http://ceeds.unimi.it <http://ceeds.unimi.it/> )

of the Department of Economics, Management and Quantitative Methods (DEMM), University of Milan

has open the following position of Associate Professor ("professore associato" in the Italian system) in STATISTICS:

"n. 1 posto - s.c. 13/D1, ssd SECS-S/01 (Codice 3766), settore concorsuale 13/D1 - Statistica, SECS-S/01 - Statistica"


Deadline: 29th June 2018, 12am (Italian local time)


Particular attention will be given to candidates with an excellent research record and showing the potential to cooperate with the current members of the department in pursuing DEMM?s strategy in the development of Data Science and Economics.

(R is a plus!)

More information about the application procedure can ben found here:  http://www.unimi.it/ateneo/valcomp/95799.htm <http://www.unimi.it/ateneo/valcomp/95799.htm>

Further contacts: datasciencelab at unimi.it <mailto:datasciencelab at unimi.it>, stefano.iacus at unimi.it <mailto:stefano.iacus at unimi.it>




-----------------------------------
Prof. Stefano M. Iacus, Ph.D.
Director of DSE - Master in Data Science & Economics
http://www.dse.unimi.it
CEO/CTO/Co-Founder VOICES from the Blogs
http://www.voices-int.com

Department of Economics,
Management and Quantitative Methods
University of Milan
Via Conservatorio, 7
I-20123 Milan - Italy
Ph.: +39 02 50321 461
Fax: +39 02 50321 505
Twitter: @iacus
http://scholar.google.com/citations?user=JBs9tJ4AAAAJ&hl=en
http://orcid.org/0000-0002-4884-0047

Master in Finance & Economics
http://www.dse.unimi.it
Twitter: @dseunimi
Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/dseunimi
Email and further information at: dse at unimi.it


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Please don't send me Word or PowerPoint attachments if not 
absolutely necessary. See:
http://www.gnu.org/philosophy/no-word-attachments.html






	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]

messages.subject: [R-jobs] R++ is looking for a Native English Speaker Translator
messages.subject_clean: [R-jobs] R++ is looking for a Native English Speaker Translator
messages.body_plain:
Z?brys is looking for a Native English Speaker Statistician to translate
many statistics-related documents. 

### ABOUT Z?BRYS ### 

Z?brys is a startup which designs the software _R++, THE NEXT STEP_. 

_R++, THE NEXT STEP_ is a new Graphical User Interface for R. It comes
from 3 years of research with different teams specialized in HMI. 

The first video presentation is available on Youtube (comments are in
French, but the video is understandable even without sound):
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iVtMpKABn0U [1] 

### IN SHORT ### 

Z?brys is eager to translate many things (!) into English: 

 	* _R++, THE NEXT STEP_ (the software),
 	* R++ website,
 	* videos,
 	* blog articles?

English is your mother tongue, you master R and statistics? You are
interested in translating all (or some) of these? 

Get in touch with Christophe, Z?brys' CEO: 

 	* cg at rplusplus.com
 	* or https://www.linkedin.com/in/christophe-genolini/ [2]

### MORE INFORMATION IS AVAILABLE ONLINE ### 

https://rplusplus.com/ [3] 

https://www.youtube.com/c/rplusplus [4] 

https://www.linkedin.com/company/rplusplus/ [5] 

https://twitter.com/rplusplus [6] 

https://www.facebook.com/rpluspluslogiciel/ [7] 

Links:
------
[1] https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iVtMpKABn0U
[2] https://www.linkedin.com/in/christophe-genolini/
[3] https://rplusplus.com/
[4] https://www.youtube.com/c/rplusplus
[5] https://www.linkedin.com/company/rplusplus/
[6] https://twitter.com/rplusplus
[7] https://www.facebook.com/rpluspluslogiciel/
